mapper.select: select * from medical_card where user_id = #{userId} order by is_default desc, id desc
select * from medical_card where user_id = #{userId} and is_default = 1 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into medical_card(user_id, card_no, patient_name, phone, id_card, is_default, status, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{cardNo}, #{patientName}, #{phone}, #{idCard}, #{isDefault}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: update medical_card set patient_name = #{patientName}, phone = #{phone}, id_card = #{idCard}, is_default = #{isDefault}, status = #{status} where id = #{id}
update medical_card set is_default = 0 where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: delete from medical_card where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from medical_card where user_id = #{userId}
